clinicalProblem.clinicalIntent: Provide evidence-based SBP and DBP goal recommendations for hypertension patients based on CVD risk stratification
clinicalProblem.whenToUse: Initial hypertension diagnosis, treatment target setting, medication titration, follow-up assessment
clinicalProblem.decisionOrAction: Assign SBP goal (<130 mm Hg with encouragement for <120 mm Hg) and DBP goal (<80 mm Hg) based on increased CVD risk status

navigationPath.purpose: Entry point for BP goal recommendation
Calculate 10-year predicted CVD risk using PREVENT
Determine if patient is at increased risk (≥7.5%) or not
Display SBP goal based on risk stratification
Display DBP goal based on risk stratification
Show Class of Recommendation and Level of Evidence
Next steps for achieving BP goals

confirmedHypertension.validation: Must be true for recommendation application

validationRules: PREVENT calculator must be used for risk estimation

rules: Step 1: Determine if patient has confirmed hypertension
Step 2: Calculate 10-year predicted CVD risk using PREVENT
Step 3: Classify risk: Increased risk if ≥7.5%, otherwise not increased risk
Step 4: Apply SBP goal based on risk classification and COR/LOE
Step 5: Apply DBP goal based on risk classification and COR/LOE
Step 6: For increased risk patients: SBP goal <130 mm Hg with encouragement for <120 mm Hg (COR 1, LOE A)
Step 7: For NOT increased risk patients: SBP goal <130 mm Hg with encouragement for <120 mm Hg (COR 2b, LOE B-NR)
Step 8: For increased risk patients: DBP target <80 mm Hg (COR 1, LOE B-R)
Step 9: For NOT increased risk patients: DBP target <80 mm Hg (COR 2b, LOE B-NR)

sbpGoals.goal: <130 mm Hg with encouragement for <120 mm Hg
sbpGoals.clinicalIntent: Reduce risk of cardiovascular events and total mortality

sbpGoals.goal: <130 mm Hg with encouragement for <120 mm Hg
sbpGoals.clinicalIntent: Reduce risk of further elevation of BP

dbpGoals.clinicalIntent: Reduce risk of cardiovascular events and total mortality

thresholds.sbp: Not applicable for BP goals (see Hypertension module for crisis)
thresholds.dbp: Not applicable for BP goals (see Hypertension module for crisis)

nextStepRouting.providerSuggestion: Initiate or intensify antihypertensive therapy to achieve SBP goal of <130 mm Hg (encourage <120 mm Hg) and DBP <80 mm Hg
nextStepRouting.followUpTiming: Reassess BP in 1-3 months; recalculate CVD risk annually or with clinical status change
nextStepRouting.repeatMeasurement: Confirm BP goal attainment with standardized office and/or home BP monitoring
nextStepRouting.navigatorEscalation: Flag patients not achieving goals despite maximally tolerated therapy for medication review
nextStepRouting.documentation: Log BP goals, risk group, COR/LOE assignment, and attainment status to health record
